title: Forms – Applications and submissions – Veterinary drugs - Canada.ca
content:
## Forms – Applications and submissions – Veterinary drugs
This section provides tools and information needed to help veterinary drug sponsors comply with the Food and Drugs Act and Regulations .
Health Canada regulates veterinary drugs used in food-producing and companion animals to ensure that they are safe, effective and of high quality. Learn more about regulating veterinary drugs .

## Veterinary Application / Submission Forms:
- Third Party Authorization Form (PDF version  - 121 KB) (Microsoft Word version – 85 KB)
- Comprehensive summary: Bioequivalence (CS-BE)
- Product Classification Request Form - Veterinary Drugs Directorate (VDD)
- Veterinary Drug Experimental Studies Certificate (ESC) Application Form
- Certified Product Information Document (CPID)
- Quality Overall Summary - New Drug Submissions/Abbreviated New Drug Submissions (VDD QOS (NDS/ANDS))
- Master File Application Form [2025-11-05] Download stylesheet ZIP file
- Veterinary Drugs Submissions Applications and Fee Form [in effect as of April 1, 2025] Veterinary Drugs Submissions Applications and Fee Form [in effect until March 31, 2025]
- Veterinary Drugs Submissions Applications and Fee Form [in effect until March 31, 2025]
- Health Canada 3011: Drug Submission Application Form for Human, Veterinary or Disinfectant Drugs and Clinical Trial Application/Attestation Please note that, as of October 1, 2022, the 3011 should no longer be used for applications for pharmaceutical, biologic and radiopharmaceutical drugs for human and veterinary use as well as disinfectants, pursuant to Part C, Division 1 and Division 8 of the Food and Drug Regulations. Instead, please use the Regulatory Enrolment Process . (DOC Version - 228 KB)
(DOC Version - 228 KB)
- Pre-Submission Meeting Request (PDF Version - 863 K)
- Submission Certificate for a NDS, SNDS, SANDS, ANDS, or NC (DOC Version - 42 KB)
(DOC Version - 42 KB)
- Administrative changes - Certification Form for Veterinary Drugs (PDF Version - 679 K)
- Post-notice of compliance changes of veterinary drugs: Level III form
- Emergency Drug Release (EDR) Fee Form (PDF, 333K)
